description: Central data storage in Fabric — stores files and Delta Lake tables on OneLake. Provides a SQL analytics endpoint for T-SQL queries, and an Iceberg REST Catalog for table metadata. The foundation for most Fabric data workflows.
notes: Create is LRO (202, polls until complete)
No definition parts needed for creation (empty definition)
Tables are Delta format under Tables/ path
Auto-creates a companion SQL analytics endpoint
Use --enable-schemas for multi-schema support (cannot be changed after creation)
